mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, annual_income, total_assets, is_house_owner, house_count, family_count, is_married, subscription_period, no_house_period, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{annualIncome}, #{totalAssets}, #{isHouseOwner}, #{houseCount}, #{familyCount}, #{isMarried}, #{subscriptionPeriod}, #{noHousePeriod}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET annual_income = #{annualIncome}, total_assets = #{totalAssets}, is_house_owner = #{isHouseOwner}, house_count = #{houseCount}, family_count = #{familyCount}, is_married = #{isMarried}, subscription_period = #{subscriptionPeriod}, no_house_period = #{noHousePeriod}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
